variations.name: Falling Water Refined
variations.description: A serene stained glass transom inspired by Frank Lloyd Wright's Fallingwater house. Transforms the rising energy of celebration balloons into cascading water energy with horizontal cantilever tiers, geometric water drops, flowing stream lines, and naturalistic rock ledges. Features a calming water palette of blues and teals with stone accents.
variations.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 320 100">
  <defs>
    <!-- Lead line styles -->
    <style>
      .lead { fill: none; stroke: #1a1a1a; stroke-width: 1.2; stroke-linejoin: round; }
      .lead-thin { fill: none; stroke: #1a1a1a; stroke-width: 0.8; }
      .lead-accent { fill: none; stroke: #2d2d2d; stroke-width: 0.6; }
    </style>

    <!-- Water gradients -->
    <linearGradient id="deepWater" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#4A90A4"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3A7A94"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="midWater" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#6BB3D9"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#5AA3C9"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="lightWater" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#89CFF0"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#79BFE0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="foam" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#FFFFFF"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#F5FAFA"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="stoneGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#5C5C5C"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#4A4A4A"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="sandstoneGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#8B7355"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#7A6345"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="skyGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#E8F4F8"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#D8E8EF"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="poolGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#5AA3C9"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#4A90A4"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3A7A94"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>

  <!-- Background sky/mist field -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="320" height="100" fill="url(#skyGrad)"/>

  <!-- Outer border frame -->
  <rect x="2" y="2" width="316" height="96" class="lead" fill="none"/>
  <rect x="6" y="6" width="308" height="88" class="lead-thin" fill="none"/>

  <!-- Corner stone accents - top left -->
  <polygon points="6,6 22,6 6,22" fill="#5C5C5C"/>
  <polygon points="6,6 22,6 6,22" class="lead-accent"/>

  <!-- Corner stone accents - top right -->
  <polygon points="314,6 298,6 314,22" fill="#5C5C5C"/>
  <polygon points="314,6 298,6 314,22" class="lead-accent"/>

  <!-- Corner stone accents - bottom left -->
  <polygon points="6,94 22,94 6,78" fill="#8B7355"/>
  <polygon points="6,94 22,94 6,78" class="lead-accent"/>

  <!-- Corner stone accents - bottom right -->
  <polygon points="314,94 298,94 314,78" fill="#8B7355"/>
  <polygon points="314,94 298,94 314,78" class="lead-accent"/>

  <!-- TOP TIER - First cantilever ledge -->
  <rect x="80" y="12" width="160" height="6" fill="url(#sandstoneGrad)"/>
  <rect x="80" y="12" width="160" height="6" class="lead"/>

  <!-- Top tier water drops (teardrops falling) -->
  <path d="M110,18 L106,28 Q110,34 114,28 Z" fill="url(#lightWater)"/>
  <path d="M110,18 L106,28 Q110,34 114,28 Z" class="lead-thin"/>
  
  <path d="M160,18 L155,30 Q160,38 165,30 Z" fill="url(#midWater)"/>
  <path d="M160,18 L155,30 Q160,38 165,30 Z" class="lead-thin"/>
  
  <path d="M210,18 L206,28 Q210,34 214,28 Z" fill="url(#lightWater)"/>
  <path d="M210,18 L206,28 Q210,34 214,28 Z" class="lead-thin"/>

  <!-- MIDDLE TIER - Second cantilever ledge (wider) -->
  <rect x="50" y="38" width="220" height="8" fill="url(#stoneGrad)"/>
  <rect x="50" y="38" width="220" height="8" class="lead"/>

  <!-- Middle tier cascade - more drops -->
  <path d="M75,46 L70,58 Q75,66 80,58 Z" fill="url(#midWater)"/>
  <path d="M75,46 L70,58 Q75,66 80,58 Z" class="lead-thin"/>

  <path d="M115,46 L110,60 Q115,68 120,60 Z" fill="url(#deepWater)"/>
  <path d="M115,46 L110,60 Q115,68 120,60 Z" class="lead-thin"/>

  <path d="M160,46 L154,62 Q160,72 166,62 Z" fill="url(#midWater)"/>
  <path d="M160,46 L154,62 Q160,72 166,62 Z" class="lead-thin"/>

  <path d="M205,46 L200,60 Q205,68 210,60 Z" fill="url(#deepWater)"/>
  <path d="M205,46 L200,60 Q205,68 210,60 Z" class="lead-thin"/>

  <path d="M245,46 L240,58 Q245,66 250,58 Z" fill="url(#midWater)"/>
  <path d="M245,46 L240,58 Q245,66 250,58 Z" class="lead-thin"/>

  <!-- Diamond water drops (geometric variation) -->
  <polygon points="95,50 90,60 95,70 100,60" fill="url(#lightWater)"/>
  <polygon points="95,50 90,60 95,70 100,60" class="lead-thin"/>

  <polygon points="140,48 134,60 140,72 146,60" fill="url(#lightWater)"/>
  <polygon points="140,48 134,60 140,72 146,60" class="lead-thin"/>

  <polygon points="180,48 174,60 180,72 186,60" fill="url(#lightWater)"/>
  <polygon points="180,48 174,60 180,72 186,60" class="lead-thin"/>

  <polygon points="225,50 220,60 225,70 230,60" fill="url(#lightWater)"/>
  <polygon points="225,50 220,60 225,70 230,60" class="lead-thin"/>

  <!-- Flowing stream lines (curved paths going down) -->
  <path d="M85,46 Q80,55 85,65 Q90,75 85,85" fill="none" stroke="#6BB3D9" stroke-width="2"/>
  <path d="M85,46 Q80,55 85,65 Q90,75 85,85" class="lead-accent"/>

  <path d="M130,46 Q135,58 130,70 Q125,80 130,90" fill="none" stroke="#89CFF0" stroke-width="2.5"/>
  <path d="M130,46 Q135,58 130,70 Q125,80 130,90" class="lead-accent"/>

  <path d="M160,38 Q155,50 160,62 Q165,74 160,86" fill="none" stroke="#4A90A4" stroke-width="3"/>
  <path d="M160,38 Q155,50 160,62 Q165,74 160,86" class="lead-accent"/>

  <path d="M190,46 Q185,58 190,70 Q195,80 190,90" fill="none" stroke="#89CFF0" stroke-width="2.5"/>
  <path d="M190,46 Q185,58 190,70 Q195,80 190,90" class="lead-accent"/>

  <path d="M235,46 Q240,55 235,65 Q230,75 235,85" fill="none" stroke="#6BB3D9" stroke-width="2"/>
  <path d="M235,46 Q240,55 235,65 Q230,75 235,85" class="lead-accent"/>

  <!-- BOTTOM - Pool/collection area -->
  <path d="M30,78 L290,78 L290,94 L30,94 Z" fill="url(#poolGrad)"/>
  <path d="M30,78 L290,78 L290,94 L30,94 Z" class="lead"/>

  <!-- Pool ripple lines -->
  <ellipse cx="100" cy="86" rx="15" ry="3" fill="none" stroke="#F5FAFA" stroke-width="0.8"/>
  <ellipse cx="160" cy="84" rx="20" ry="4" fill="none" stroke="#F5FAFA" stroke-width="1"/>
  <ellipse cx="220" cy="86" rx="15" ry="3" fill="none" stroke="#F5FAFA" stroke-width="0.8"/>

  <!-- Foam/spray particles (like confetti, but mist) -->
  <circle cx="70" cy="72" r="1.5" fill="#F5FAFA"/>
  <circle cx="88" cy="68" r="1" fill="#F5FAFA"/>
  <circle cx="105" cy="74" r="1.2" fill="#F5FAFA"/>
  <circle cx="150" cy="70" r="1.5" fill="#F5FAFA"/>
  <circle cx="170" cy="68" r="1" fill="#F5FAFA"/>
  <circle cx="195" cy="72" r="1.3" fill="#F5FAFA"/>
  <circle cx="215" cy="74" r="1" fill="#F5FAFA"/>
  <circle cx="232" cy="68" r="1.2" fill="#F5FAFA"/>
  <circle cx="250" cy="72" r="1.5" fill="#F5FAFA"/>

  <!-- Rock/ledge elements at sides -->
  <path d="M10,50 L25,45 L30,55 L25,65 L10,60 Z" fill="url(#sandstoneGrad)"/>
  <path d="M10,50 L25,45 L30,55 L25,65 L10,60 Z" class="lead-thin"/>

  <path d="M310,50 L295,45 L290,55 L295,65 L310,60 Z" fill="url(#sandstoneGrad)"/>
  <path d="M310,50 L295,45 L290,55 L295,65 L310,60 Z" class="lead-thin"/>

  <!-- Additional rock formations -->
  <polygon points="25,78 40,70 50,78" fill="#5C5C5C"/>
  <polygon points="25,78 40,70 50,78" class="lead-thin"/>

  <polygon points="270,78 280,70 295,78" fill="#5C5C5C"/>
  <polygon points="270,78 280,70 295,78" class="lead-thin"/>

  <!-- Left side decorative water bands -->
  <rect x="10" y="30" width="12" height="4" fill="#6BB3D9"/>
  <rect x="10" y="30" width="12" height="4" class="lead-accent"/>
  <rect x="10" y="36" width="12" height="3" fill="#89CFF0"/>
  <rect x="10" y="36" width="12" height="3" class="lead-accent"/>

  <!-- Right side decorative water bands -->
  <rect x="298" y="30" width="12" height="4" fill="#6BB3D9"/>
  <rect x="298" y="30" width="12" height="4" class="lead-accent"/>
  <rect x="298" y="36" width="12" height="3" fill="#89CFF0"/>
  <rect x="298" y="36" width="12" height="3" class="lead-accent"/>

  <!-- Horizontal division lines suggesting water levels -->
  <line x1="30" y1="25" x2="50" y2="25" class="lead-accent"/>
  <line x1="270" y1="25" x2="290" y2="25" class="lead-accent"/>
</svg>

variations.name: Falling Water Animated
variations.description: An animated version of the Falling Water transom with CSS animations for cascading water drops, subtle shimmer effects on water surfaces, gentle ripple animations in the pool, and flowing stream line movements. The animations create a serene, meditative quality evoking the continuous flow of water.
variations.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 320 100">
  <defs>
    <!-- Lead line styles -->
    <style>
      .lead { fill: none; stroke: #1a1a1a; stroke-width: 1.2; stroke-linejoin: round; }
      .lead-thin { fill: none; stroke: #1a1a1a; stroke-width: 0.8; }
      .lead-accent { fill: none; stroke: #2d2d2d; stroke-width: 0.6; }
      
      /* Cascading drop animations - staggered downward movement */
      .drop-1 { animation: cascade 3s ease-in-out infinite; }
      .drop-2 { animation: cascade 3s ease-in-out 0.3s infinite; }
      .drop-3 { animation: cascade 3s ease-in-out 0.6s infinite; }
      .drop-4 { animation: cascade 3s ease-in-out 0.9s infinite; }
      .drop-5 { animation: cascade 3s ease-in-out 1.2s infinite; }
      .drop-6 { animation: cascade 3s ease-in-out 0.15s infinite; }
      .drop-7 { animation: cascade 3s ease-in-out 0.45s infinite; }
      .drop-8 { animation: cascade 3s ease-in-out 0.75s infinite; }
      .drop-9 { animation: cascade 3s ease-in-out 1.05s infinite; }
      
      @keyframes cascade {
        0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; }
        40% { transform: translateY(4px); opacity: 0.9; }
        70% { transform: translateY(2px); opacity: 1; }
      }
      
      /* Shimmer effect on water surfaces */
      .shimmer {
        animation: shimmer 4s ease-in-out infinite;
      }
      
      @keyframes shimmer {
        0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
        50% { opacity: 0.7; }
      }
      
      /* Ripple animations in pool */
      .ripple-1 { animation: ripple 4s ease-in-out infinite; }
      .ripple-2 { animation: ripple 4s ease-in-out 1.3s infinite; }
      .ripple-3 { animation: ripple 4s ease-in-out 2.6s infinite; }
      
      @keyframes ripple {
        0% { transform: scale(0.8); opacity: 0; }
        50% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.8; }
        100% { transform: scale(1.2); opacity: 0; }
      }
      
      /* Flowing stream animation */
      .stream-1 { animation: flow 5s ease-in-out infinite; }
      .stream-2 { animation: flow 5s ease-in-out 1s infinite; }
      .stream-3 { animation: flow 5s ease-in-out 2s infinite; }
      .stream-4 { animation: flow 5s ease-in-out 3s infinite; }
      .stream-5 { animation: flow 5s ease-in-out 4s infinite; }
      
      @keyframes flow {
        0%, 100% { stroke-dashoffset: 0; opacity: 0.9; }
        50% { stroke-dashoffset: 10; opacity: 1; }
      }
      
      /* Mist particle float */
      .mist-1 { animation: mist 6s ease-in-out infinite; }
      .mist-2 { animation: mist 6s ease-in-out 1s infinite; }
      .mist-3 { animation: mist 6s ease-in-out 2s infinite; }
      .mist-4 { animation: mist 6s ease-in-out 3s infinite; }
      
      @keyframes mist {
        0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0) translateX(0); opacity: 0.6; }
        25% { transform: translateY(-2px) translateX(1px); opacity: 0.9; }
        50% { transform: translateY(-1px) translateX(-1px); opacity: 0.7; }
        75% { transform: translateY(1px) translateX(2px); opacity: 0.8; }
      }
    </style>

    <!-- Water gradients -->
    <linearGradient id="deepWater" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#4A90A4"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3A7A94"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="midWater" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#6BB3D9"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#5AA3C9"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="lightWater" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#89CFF0"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#79BFE0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="foam" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#FFFFFF"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#F5FAFA"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="stoneGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#5C5C5C"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#4A4A4A"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="sandstoneGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#8B7355"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#7A6345"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="skyGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#E8F4F8"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#D8E8EF"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="poolGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#5AA3C9"/>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#4A90A4"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3A7A94"/>
    </linearGradient>
    
    <!-- Animated shimmer gradient -->
    <linearGradient id="shimmerGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#89CFF0">
        <animate attributeName="stop-color" values="#89CFF0;#FFFFFF;#89CFF0" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </stop>
      <stop offset="50%" stop-color="#FFFFFF">
        <animate attributeName="stop-color" values="#FFFFFF;#89CFF0;#FFFFFF" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </stop>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#89CFF0">
        <animate attributeName="stop-color" values="#89CFF0;#FFFFFF;#89CFF0" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
      </stop>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>

  <!-- Background sky/mist field -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="320" height="100" fill="url(#skyGrad)"/>

  <!-- Outer border frame -->
  <rect x="2" y="2" width="316" height="96" class="lead" fill="none"/>
  <rect x="6" y="6" width="308" height="88" class="lead-thin" fill="none"/>

  <!-- Corner stone accents -->
  <polygon points="6,6 22,6 6,22" fill="#5C5C5C"/>
  <polygon points="6,6 22,6 6,22" class="lead-accent"/>
  <polygon points="314,6 298,6 314,22" fill="#5C5C5C"/>
  <polygon points="314,6 298,6 314,22" class="lead-accent"/>
  <polygon points="6,94 22,94 6,78" fill="#8B7355"/>
  <polygon points="6,94 22,94 6,78" class="lead-accent"/>
  <polygon points="314,94 298,94 314,78" fill="#8B7355"/>
  <polygon points="314,94 298,94 314,78" class="lead-accent"/>

  <!-- TOP TIER - First cantilever ledge -->
  <rect x="80" y="12" width="160" height="6" fill="url(#sandstoneGrad)"/>
  <rect x="80" y="12" width="160" height="6" class="lead"/>

  <!-- Top tier water drops with cascade animation -->
  <g class="drop-1">
    <path d="M110,18 L106,28 Q110,34 114,28 Z" fill="url(#lightWater)"/>
    <path d="M110,18 L106,28 Q110,34 114,28 Z" class="lead-thin"/>
  </g>
  
  <g class="drop-2">
    <path d="M160,18 L155,30 Q160,38 165,30 Z" fill="url(#midWater)"/>
    <path d="M160,18 L155,30 Q160,38 165,30 Z" class="lead-thin"/>
  </g>
  
  <g class="drop-3">
    <path d="M210,18 L206,28 Q210,34 214,28 Z" fill="url(#lightWater)"/>
    <path d="M210,18 L206,28 Q210,34 214,28 Z" class="lead-thin"/>
  </g>

  <!-- MIDDLE TIER - Second cantilever ledge -->
  <rect x="50" y="38" width="220" height="8" fill="url(#stoneGrad)"/>
  <rect x="50" y="38" width="220" height="8" class="lead"/>

  <!-- Middle tier cascade drops with staggered animation -->
  <g class="drop-4">
    <path d="M75,46 L70,58 Q75,66 80,58 Z" fill="url(#midWater)"/>
    <path d="M75,46 L70,58 Q75,66 80,58 Z" class="lead-thin"/>
  </g>

  <g class="drop-5">
    <path d="M115,46 L110,60 Q115,68 120,60 Z" fill="url(#deepWater)"/>
    <path d="M115,46 L110,60 Q115,68 120,60 Z" class="lead-thin"/>
  </g>

  <g class="drop-1">
    <path d="M160,46 L154,62 Q160,72 166,62 Z" fill="url(#midWater)"/>
    <path d="M160,46 L154,62 Q160,72 166,62 Z" class="lead-thin"/>
  </g>

  <g class="drop-6">
    <path d="M205,46 L200,60 Q205,68 210,60 Z" fill="url(#deepWater)"/>
    <path d="M205,46 L200,60 Q205,68 210,60 Z" class="lead-thin"/>
  </g>

  <g class="drop-7">
    <path d="M245,46 L240,58 Q245,66 250,58 Z" fill="url(#midWater)"/>
    <path d="M245,46 L240,58 Q245,66 250,58 Z" class="lead-thin"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Diamond water drops with animation -->
  <g class="drop-8">
    <polygon points="95,50 90,60 95,70 100,60" fill="url(#shimmerGrad)"/>
    <polygon points="95,50 90,60 95,70 100,60" class="lead-thin"/>
  </g>

  <g class="drop-9">
    <polygon points="140,48 134,60 140,72 146,60" fill="url(#lightWater)" class="shimmer"/>
    <polygon points="140,48 134,60 140,72 146,60" class="lead-thin"/>
  </g>

  <g class="drop-8">
    <polygon points="180,48 174,60 180,72 186,60" fill="url(#lightWater)" class="shimmer"/>
    <polygon points="180,48 174,60 180,72 186,60" class="lead-thin"/>
  </g>

  <g class="drop-9">
    <polygon points="225,50 220,60 225,70 230,60" fill="url(#shimmerGrad)"/>
    <polygon points="225,50 220,60 225,70 230,60" class="lead-thin"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Flowing stream lines with animation -->
  <g class="stream-1">
    <path d="M85,46 Q80,55 85,65 Q90,75 85,85" fill="none" stroke="#6BB3D9" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5,3"/>
    <path d="M85,46 Q80,55 85,65 Q90,75 85,85" class="lead-accent"/>
  </g>

  <g class="stream-2">
    <path d="M130,46 Q135,58 130,70 Q125,80 130,90" fill="none" stroke="#89CFF0" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-dasharray="6,4"/>
    <path d="M130,46 Q135,58 130,70 Q125,80 130,90" class="lead-accent"/>
  </g>

  <g class="stream-3">
    <path d="M160,38 Q155,50 160,62 Q165,74 160,86" fill="none" stroke="#4A90A4" stroke-width="3" stroke-dasharray="8,4"/>
    <path d="M160,38 Q155,50 160,62 Q165,74 160,86" class="lead-accent"/>
  </g>

  <g class="stream-4">
    <path d="M190,46 Q185,58 190,70 Q195,80 190,90" fill="none" stroke="#89CFF0" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-dasharray="6,4"/>
    <path d="M190,46 Q185,58 190,70 Q195,80 190,90" class="lead-accent"/>
  </g>

  <g class="stream-5">
    <path d="M235,46 Q240,55 235,65 Q230,75 235,85" fill="none" stroke="#6BB3D9" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5,3"/>
    <path d="M235,46 Q240,55 235,65 Q230,75 235,85" class="lead-accent"/>
  </g>

  <!-- BOTTOM - Pool/collection area -->
  <path d="M30,78 L290,78 L290,94 L30,94 Z" fill="url(#poolGrad)"/>
  <path d="M30,78 L290,78 L290,94 L30,94 Z" class="lead"/>

  <!-- Animated pool ripples -->
  <g class="ripple-1">
    <ellipse cx="100" cy="86" rx="15" ry="3" fill="none" stroke="#F5FAFA" stroke-width="0.8"/>
  </g>
  <g class="ripple-2">
    <ellipse cx="160" cy="84" rx="20" ry="4" fill="none" stroke="#F5FAFA" stroke-width="1"/>
  </g>
  <g class="ripple-3">
    <ellipse cx="220" cy="86" rx="15" ry="3" fill="none" stroke="#F5FAFA" stroke-width="0.8"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Animated mist/spray particles -->
  <circle cx="70" cy="72" r="1.5" fill="#F5FAFA" class="mist-1"/>
  <circle cx="88" cy="68" r="1" fill="#F5FAFA" class="mist-2"/>
  <circle cx="105" cy="74" r="1.2" fill="#F5FAFA" class="mist-3"/>
  <circle cx="150" cy="70" r="1.5" fill="#F5FAFA" class="mist-4"/>
  <circle cx="170" cy="68" r="1" fill="#F5FAFA" class="mist-1"/>
  <circle cx="195" cy="72" r="1.3" fill="#F5FAFA" class="mist-2"/>
  <circle cx="215" cy="74" r="1" fill="#F5FAFA" class="mist-3"/>
  <circle cx="232" cy="68" r="1.2" fill="#F5FAFA" class="mist-4"/>
  <circle cx="250" cy="72" r="1.5" fill="#F5FAFA" class="mist-1"/>

  <!-- Rock/ledge elements at sides -->
  <path d="M10,50 L25,45 L30,55 L25,65 L10,60 Z" fill="url(#sandstoneGrad)"/>
  <path d="M10,50 L25,45 L30,55 L25,65 L10,60 Z" class="lead-thin"/>
  <path d="M310,50 L295,45 L290,55 L295,65 L310,60 Z" fill="url(#sandstoneGrad)"/>
  <path d="M310,50 L295,45 L290,55 L295,65 L310,60 Z" class="lead-thin"/>

  <!-- Additional rock formations -->
  <polygon points="25,78 40,70 50,78" fill="#5C5C5C"/>
  <polygon points="25,78 40,70 50,78" class="lead-thin"/>
  <polygon points="270,78 280,70 295,78" fill="#5C5C5C"/>
  <polygon points="270,78 280,70 295,78" class="lead-thin"/>

  <!-- Side decorative water bands -->
  <rect x="10" y="30" width="12" height="4" fill="#6BB3D9" class="shimmer"/>
  <rect x="10" y="30" width="12" height="4" class="lead-accent"/>
  <rect x="10" y="36" width="12" height="3" fill="#89CFF0" class="shimmer"/>
  <rect x="10" y="36" width="12" height="3" class="lead-accent"/>
  <rect x="298" y="30" width="12" height="4" fill="#6BB3D9" class="shimmer"/>
  <rect x="298" y="30" width="12" height="4" class="lead-accent"/>
  <rect x="298" y="36" width="12" height="3" fill="#89CFF0" class="shimmer"/>
  <rect x="298" y="36" width="12" height="3" class="lead-accent"/>

  <!-- Horizontal division lines -->
  <line x1="30" y1="25" x2="50" y2="25" class="lead-accent"/>
  <line x1="270" y1="25" x2="290" y2="25" class="lead-accent"/>
</svg>

production_notes:
Design Decisions and Techniques:

1. CONCEPT TRANSLATION:
   - Rising balloons (6 circles) transformed into falling water drops (teardrops and diamonds)
   - Upward curved strings became downward flowing stream lines with sinuous curves
   - Playful confetti flags evolved into serene mist/spray particles
   - Horizontal tiers reference Fallingwater's iconic cantilever architecture

2. COLOR PALETTE:
   - Deep Water: #4A90A4 (primary, darkest tone)
   - Mid Water: #6BB3D9 (secondary cascade color)
   - Light Water: #89CFF0 (highlights, top tier drops)
   - Foam White: #F5FAFA (spray particles, ripples)
   - Stone Gray: #5C5C5C (rock formations, ledges)
   - Sandstone: #8B7355 (cantilever tiers, warm contrast)
   - Sky Mist: #E8F4F8 (background, atmospheric)

3. STRUCTURAL ELEMENTS:
   - Two horizontal cantilever tiers at y=12 and y=38 (like Fallingwater's terraces)
   - Pool collection area at bottom (y=78-94)
   - Corner stone accents maintain frame integrity
   - Rock formations anchor the cascades at sides

4. WATER DROP VARIATIONS:
   - Teardrop shapes: Organic, flowing downward (paths with curves)
   - Diamond shapes: Geometric, FLW-inspired (polygons)
   - Multiple sizes create depth and visual rhythm

5. ANIMATION TECHNIQUES (Animated Version):
   - Cascade: Staggered downward micro-movements (0-1.2s delays)
   - Shimmer: Opacity pulsing for light play on water surface
   - Ripple: Scale animation for expanding pool circles
   - Flow: Stroke-dashoffset animation for moving stream lines
   - Mist: Multi-directional float for spray particles

6. LEAD LINE STYLING:
   - Consistent with existing transoms (.lead, .lead-thin, .lead-accent)
   - Dark strokes (#1a1a1a, #2d2d2d) simulate zinc caming
   - All glass pieces properly outlined for stained glass effect

7. PRODUCTION CONSIDERATIONS:
   - ViewBox: 320x100 (standard transom proportions)
   - All gradients defined in <defs> for efficiency
   - SVG is self-contained (inline CSS animations)
   - Compatible with modern browsers
   - Animations use transform and opacity for GPU acceleration
